hero.badge: Free to use, no credit card required
hero.title: Go multilingual
hero.description: Add a language switcher to your website instantly. Your visitors translate your content into their native language, right in the browser.
hero.painPoint: Building a multilingual website is tedious and expensive. Translation services, separate domains, engineering overhead. We fix that.
hero.painPointSolution: Just add one script tag to your site. A language switcher widget appears. Powered by Google Translate. Visitors click and the entire page translates on the spot. Images and logos stay untouched, your design remains intact.
hero.imagesNote: Images and logos are excluded from translation. Your design stays exactly as intended.

docs.title: Lswitch — One Line to Go Global
docs.description: Add a multilingual language switcher to your website with a single script tag. Your visitors translate your content into their native language, instantly.

whatIs.title: What is LSwitch?
whatIs.intro: LSwitch is a lightweight widget that adds a language switcher to any website. When a visitor clicks the button, the entire page is translated in real-time using Google Translate. No server setup, no API keys, no backend required.

points.title: Client-Side Translation
points.description: All translation happens in the visitor's browser using Google Translate. Your server is never involved, so there's zero infrastructure cost.

points.title: One Script Tag
points.description: Copy and paste a single <script> tag into your HTML. The widget loads asynchronously and doesn't affect your page speed.

points.title: Design Stays Intact
points.description: Images, logos, and styled elements are excluded from translation. Your layout and design remain exactly as intended.

points.title: 100+ Languages
points.description: Powered by Google Translate, supporting over 100 languages out of the box — from English and Japanese to Arabic and Hindi.

quickStart.title: Quick Start Guide
quickStart.description: Get up and running in under 3 minutes.

steps.title: Create a free account
steps.description: Sign up at langswitch.online. No credit card required.

steps.title: Register your website
steps.description: Add your domain in the dashboard and choose which languages to support.

steps.title: Copy your script tag
steps.description: After registering your site, you'll get a personalized script tag. It looks like this:

steps.title: Paste it into your HTML
steps.description: Add the script tag inside the <head> section of your website. That's it — the language switcher will appear on your site automatically.

items.question: Does this affect my page loading speed?
items.answer: No. The widget loads asynchronously via a single script tag, so it doesn't block rendering or affect Core Web Vitals.

items.question: Do I need a Google Translate API key?
items.answer: No. Translation uses Google Translate's free web endpoint. No API key or billing setup is required.

items.question: Will my images or layout be affected?
items.answer: No. The widget translates only text content. Images, logos, and styled elements remain untouched.

items.question: Is there a free plan?
items.answer: Yes. The free plan includes 50 translations per month with access to all core features. Pro plan (¥980/mo) removes the limit.

items.question: What frameworks does this work with?
items.answer: LSwitch works with any website that supports HTML — WordPress, Next.js, React, static sites, and more. It's framework-agnostic.

cta.title: Ready to go global?
cta.description: Start translating your website in under 3 minutes. Free, no credit card required.
